name: Spring Boot Jar 部署
description: 在本机拉取并构建 Spring Boot Jar，再发布到目标主机或本机目录并启动受管进程。
buildScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
export PS4='+ $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") '
set -x
WORKSPACE="{{workspaceRoot}}/runs/{{deploymentId}}"
echo "[步骤 1/5] 准备本机工作目录：$WORKSPACE"
rm -rf "$WORKSPACE"
mkdir -p "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 2/5] 拉取代码：分支={{branch}} 仓库={{gitUrl}}"
git clone --depth=1 --branch "{{branch}}" "{{gitUrl}}" "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 3/5] 进入项目目录并开始构建"
cd "$WORKSPACE"
{{buildCommand}}
echo "[步骤 4/5] 准备构建产物目录：{{artifactDir}}"
mkdir -p "{{artifactDir}}"
echo "[步骤 5/5] 复制 Jar 到构建产物目录"
cp "{{jarPath}}" "{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
echo "[完成] 本机构建完成"
deployScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
export PS4='+ $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") '
set -x
echo "[步骤 1/4] 准备部署目录：{{targetDir}}"
mkdir -p "{{targetDir}}"
echo "[步骤 2/4] 发布 Jar：{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar -> {{targetDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
cp "{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar" "{{targetDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
echo "[步骤 3/4] 准备运行配置"
if [ -n "{{runtimeConfigYamlBase64}}" ]; then
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}")"
  printf '%s' '{{runtimeConfigYamlBase64}}' | base64 --decode > "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}"
else
  rm -f "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}"
fi
echo "[步骤 4/4] 启动新进程"
cd "{{targetDir}}"
{{startCommand}}
echo "[完成] Spring Boot 应用部署完成"

name: React 静态站点部署
description: 在本机构建 React 项目，再将静态产物发布到目标主机或本机目录。
buildScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
set -x
WORKSPACE="{{workspaceRoot}}/runs/{{deploymentId}}"
echo "[步骤 1/4] 准备本机工作目录"
rm -rf "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 2/4] 拉取代码并切换分支"
git clone --depth=1 --branch "{{branch}}" "{{gitUrl}}" "$WORKSPACE"
cd "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 3/4] 执行前端构建"
{{buildCommand}}
echo "[步骤 4/4] 收集静态产物"
DIST_PATH="$WORKSPACE/{{distDir}}"
for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  if [ -d "$DIST_PATH" ] && [ -n "$(find "$DIST_PATH" -mindepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done
if [ ! -d "$DIST_PATH" ]; then
  echo "未找到前端产物目录：$DIST_PATH"
  exit 1
fi
if [ -z "$(find "$DIST_PATH" -mindepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
  echo "前端产物目录为空：$DIST_PATH"
  exit 1
fi
mkdir -p "{{artifactDir}}"
rsync -a "$DIST_PATH/" "{{artifactDir}}/"
deployScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
set -x
echo "[步骤 1/2] 准备部署目录"
mkdir -p "{{targetDir}}"
echo "[步骤 2/2] 发布静态资源"
rsync -a "{{artifactDir}}/" "{{targetDir}}/"
variablesSchema: [{"name":"targetDir","label":"部署目录","placeholder":"/data/www/react-app","required":true,"phase":"deploy"},{"name":"buildCommand","label":"构建命令","placeholder":"npm ci --cache {{buildWorkspaceRoot}}/caches/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build","required":true,"phase":"build"},{"name":"distDir","label":"产物目录","placeholder":"dist","required":true,"phase":"shared"}]

for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  if [ -d "$DIST_PATH" ] && [ -n "$(find "$DIST_PATH" -mindepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then

rsync -a "$DIST_PATH/" "{{artifactDir}}/"
deployScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
set -x
echo "[步骤 1/2] 准备部署目录"
mkdir -p "{{targetDir}}"
echo "[步骤 2/2] 发布静态资源"

variablesSchema: [{"name":"buildCommand","label":"构建命令","placeholder":"npm ci --cache {{buildWorkspaceRoot}}/caches/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build","required":true,"phase":"build"},{"name":"distDir","label":"产物目录","placeholder":"dist","required":true,"phase":"build"},{"name":"targetDir","label":"部署目录","placeholder":"/data/www/vue-app","required":true,"phase":"deploy"}]

name: Spring Boot 前后端一体部署
description: 在本机完成前端构建与后端打包，再把 Jar 发布到目标主机或本机目录。
buildScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
export PS4='+ $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") '
set -x
WORKSPACE="{{workspaceRoot}}/runs/{{deploymentId}}"
echo "[步骤 1/7] 准备本机工作目录：$WORKSPACE"
rm -rf "$WORKSPACE"
mkdir -p "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 2/7] 拉取代码：分支={{branch}} 仓库={{gitUrl}}"
git clone --depth=1 --branch "{{branch}}" "{{gitUrl}}" "$WORKSPACE"
echo "[步骤 3/7] 构建前端工程：{{frontendDir}}"
cd "$WORKSPACE/{{frontendDir}}"
{{frontendBuildCommand}}
echo "[步骤 4/7] 同步前端产物到后端 static"
rm -rf "$WORKSPACE/{{backendDir}}/src/main/resources/static"
mkdir -p "$WORKSPACE/{{backendDir}}/src/main/resources/static"
cp -R "$WORKSPACE/{{frontendDir}}/{{distDir}}/." "$WORKSPACE/{{backendDir}}/src/main/resources/static/"
echo "[步骤 5/7] 构建后端工程：{{backendDir}}"
cd "$WORKSPACE/{{backendDir}}"
{{backendBuildCommand}}
echo "[步骤 6/7] 准备构建产物目录：{{artifactDir}}"
mkdir -p "{{artifactDir}}"
echo "[步骤 7/7] 复制 Jar 到构建产物目录"
cp "{{jarPath}}" "{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
echo "[完成] 前后端一体项目构建完成"
deployScriptContent:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e
export PS4='+ $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") '
set -x
echo "[步骤 1/4] 准备部署目录：{{targetDir}}"
mkdir -p "{{targetDir}}"
echo "[步骤 2/4] 发布 Jar：{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar -> {{targetDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
cp "{{artifactDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar" "{{targetDir}}/{{applicationName}}.jar"
echo "[步骤 3/4] 准备运行配置"
if [ -n "{{runtimeConfigYamlBase64}}" ]; then
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}")"
  printf '%s' '{{runtimeConfigYamlBase64}}' | base64 --decode > "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}"
else
  rm -f "{{runtimeConfigFilePath}}"
fi
echo "[步骤 4/4] 启动新进程"
cd "{{targetDir}}"
{{startCommand}}
echo "[完成] Spring Boot 前后端一体部署完成"
variablesSchema: [{"name":"frontendDir","label":"前端目录","required":true,"placeholder":"web","phase":"build"},{"name":"backendDir","label":"后端目录","required":true,"placeholder":"server","phase":"build"},{"name":"distDir","label":"前端产物目录","required":true,"placeholder":"dist","phase":"build"},{"name":"frontendBuildCommand","label":"前端构建命令","required":true,"placeholder":"npm ci --cache {{buildWorkspaceRoot}}/caches/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build","phase":"build"},{"name":"backendBuildCommand","label":"后端构建命令","required":true,"placeholder":"mvn -U clean package -DskipTests","phase":"build"},{"name":"jarPath","label":"Jar 路径","required":true,"placeholder":"target/your-app.jar","phase":"build"},{"name":"targetDir","label":"部署目录","required":true,"placeholder":"/opt/apps/fullstack-app","phase":"deploy"},{"name":"startCommand","label":"启动命令","required":true,"placeholder":"nohup java -jar {{applicationName}}.jar > {{applicationName}}.log 2>&1 &","phase":"deploy"}]
